title: Incubate eggs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Incubate eggs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Receive and store eggs

pcs.text: Identify and implement enterprise biosecurity procedures that apply to incubating eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement enterprise biosecurity procedures that apply to incubating eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement enterprise biosecurity procedures that apply to incubating eggs.

pcs.text: Identify tasks to be undertaken from work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tasks to be undertaken from work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tasks to be undertaken from work plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks associated with fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks associated with fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks associated with fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process.

pcs.text: Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for fumigating, operating, transferring eggs and carrying out the hatching process.

pcs.text: Check egg storage plant, equipment and tools in readiness to receive eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check egg storage plant, equipment and tools in readiness to receive eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check egg storage plant, equipment and tools in readiness to receive eggs.

pcs.text: Unload eggs from delivery vehicle, transfer to setter trolleys and record temperature, humidity, storage period and other required information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload eggs from delivery vehicle, transfer to setter trolleys and record temperature, humidity, storage period and other required information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload eggs from delivery vehicle, transfer to setter trolleys and record temperature, humidity, storage period and other required information.

pcs.text: Attach eggs to turning machine and manage eggs according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attach eggs to turning machine and manage eggs according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach eggs to turning machine and manage eggs according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust temperature, humidity and airflow to maintain required conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust temperature, humidity and airflow to maintain required conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust temperature, humidity and airflow to maintain required conditions.

pcs.text: Complete ongoing records and report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete ongoing records and report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete ongoing records and report issues according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Receive and store eggs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify fumigation requirements according to work plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit PPE, seal room and fumigate for required period.

pcs.text: Ventilate room or chamber to remove unsafe remnants of the fumigant prior to re-entry of staff, re-installation of equipment and placement of eggs
